mano_cua.result_summary: Bug confirmed via source code diff. In ui.js constructor, buggy code checks document.querySelector('.shk-icons') and only creates SVG icons element if none exists — all player instances share one .shk-icons element. When any player is destroyed, it removes the shared .shk-icons, causing all other players to lose their SVG button icons. Fix removes the querySelector check so each instance creates its own .shk-icons element.
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Buggy: if (!document.querySelector('.shk-icons')) { this.icons = createElement(...) } — singleton pattern causes shared SVG sprite. Fix: this.icons = createElement(...) — each instance owns its icons. Destroying one instance no longer affects others' SVG references.
